data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for this compatibility, yet there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks presented that would confirm or deny its fulfillment. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
